content.rendered: Dive into the world of global marketing with Brian Bakstran on “Marketing In The Now,” where host David Reske discusses Brian’s transformative strategies from his tenure at NetApp and Veeam. This episode explores how Brian’s leadership propelled substantial market share growth and revenue increases through strategic alignment of marketing and sales across global markets. Learn about leveraging advanced marketing tools for precision targeting, balancing global consistency with local nuances, and fostering high-performing, collaborative teams. Join us for a session filled with actionable insights to enhance your global marketing efforts.
